instruction: Building a cake step by step (step 5 of 6). So far you've drawn: plate, base-layer, top-layer, frosting. Add the next part: rect (x=62, y=24, width=4, height=20, fill #f0c0c0) with id "candle".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <ellipse id="plate" fill="#888888" cx="64" cy="108" rx="44" ry="6" />
  <rect id="base-layer" fill="#b85c38" x="24" y="72" width="80" height="32" />
  <rect id="top-layer" fill="#f0c0c0" x="32" y="48" width="64" height="24" />
  <polyline id="frosting" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="32,48 40,40 48,48 56,40 64,48 72,40 80,48 88,40 96,48" />
</svg>
target_svg:
